ecology_extrapolation_refs.claim_ceiling: Theory brief and decision scaffold only; no result is preselected

applicability.rationale: Participant reserve must cover the registered one-repeat viability requirement

economy_metrics.threshold_rule: Retain raw proximity and matching evidence; a narrow pass or miss remains interpretable rather than binary acceptance

applicability.rationale: Writer and reader packet amounts are frozen debit/load surfaces

economy_metrics.threshold_rule: Match within 1e-12 except for the declared carrier-timescale contrast

applicability.rationale: Undeclared cross-branch or cross-worker state would invalidate isolation

economy_metrics.threshold_rule: No cross-branch or cross-worker state carryover is permitted

candidate_execution.rationale: Closed until REG-GATE and an exact P2-I1-EXEC-FREEZE pass

parent_basin.rationale: No distinct parent basin is represented in the primary cycle

selectivity.rationale: Registered as a polarity-susceptibility interaction but not yet executed

later_response.rationale: Four independent restored opportunity profiles per cell/seed are registered; outcomes remain absent

n29_consumption_refs.claim_ceiling: Prototype atlas with explicit producer, composition, medium, and nativity debt; not executed P2-I1 evidence

n30_supported_refs.claim_ceiling: Replay/control-backed M2 candidate with inherited source-current runtime origin; not fresh P2-I1 evidence
Artifact-level bounded minimal shared-medium participation candidate at P2/M2

n31_implication.rationale: One lane cannot select an N31+ direction before seven-lane synthesis

record.parent_basin: absent_not_represented; parent-context-contrast is a reduced-support control only

parent_closure_relevance.rationale: The primary cycle does not instantiate closure or a parent-level pattern

record.participant_medium_account: Participant continuity and model-owned feedback-row identity are separately registered; writing and reading are temporally separated, while reading remains participant-mediated and cannot support an autonomous-access claim
record.persistence_condition: The exact feedback-row identity remains present from its committed W1 write through the W2 branch point; no general decay law is claimed
record.placement_rationale: The probe asks whether a substrate-visible historical medium condition changes a later local formation possibility; at registration this is a building-block candidate, not a reusable motif

possible_co_response.rationale: No reciprocal or joint response is required by L01

source_refs.claim_ceiling: Relational niche vocabulary and conceptual motivation only
Method, mapping, control, and debt vocabulary only

susceptibility.rationale: Configured aligned versus inverted polarity is the frozen selectivity discriminator

decay.rationale: No decay law is estimated in the primary cycle

persistence.rationale: Bounded W1-to-W2 row persistence is required

reinforcement.rationale: No repeated writing schedule is registered

saturation.rationale: No accumulation or saturation claim is registered

record.transfer_boundary: Exact four-node fixture, native PyGRC 0.1 operation family, three deterministic offsets, seven registered cells, and participant-mediated configured reading only
record.transfer_scope: The carrier-timescale contrast can establish bounded reader-load invariance only; all broader transfer, domain, motif, and regime claims remain blocked
